text: What wind turbines are available in the wind farm?
characteristic_form: List of all wind turbine assets in the farm with their identifiers and locations
note: Source: Asset inventory requirements; Owner: Operations Team; Basic inventory query for wind farm overview

text: List all sensors installed on Wind Turbine WT-105.
characteristic_form: Complete list of sensors including vibration, temperature, wind speed, power output, pitch angle, and yaw position sensors
note: Source: Maintenance planning; Owner: Engineering Team; Sensor configuration query for specific turbine

text: Retrieve power output data for Wind Turbine WT-105 from January 2024.
characteristic_form: Time series data of power output in kW for the specified turbine and time period
note: Source: Performance analysis; Owner: Analytics Team; Historical power generation data retrieval

text: Get the maintenance history for Wind Turbine WT-105 in 2023.
characteristic_form: List of all maintenance activities including preventive and corrective maintenance with dates and descriptions
note: Source: Maintenance records; Owner: Maintenance Team; Historical maintenance activity query

text: What are the common failure modes for wind turbine gearboxes?
characteristic_form: List of gearbox failure modes including bearing wear, gear tooth damage, lubrication issues, and overheating
note: Source: Failure mode analysis; Owner: Reliability Engineering; Knowledge base query for failure modes

text: Show me the wind speed and power output correlation for Wind Turbine WT-105 last month.
characteristic_form: Scatter plot or correlation analysis showing relationship between wind speed and power output
note: Source: Performance analysis; Owner: Analytics Team; Performance curve validation query

text: List all alarm events for Wind Turbine WT-105 in the past week.
characteristic_form: Chronological list of alarm events with timestamps, alarm codes, and descriptions
note: Source: Operations monitoring; Owner: Operations Team; Recent alarm history query

text: What is the average capacity factor for the wind farm in Q1 2024?
characteristic_form: Calculated capacity factor percentage based on actual vs. rated power output
note: Source: Performance reporting; Owner: Management Team; Quarterly performance metric query

text: Retrieve vibration data from the gearbox of Wind Turbine WT-105 for the last 24 hours.
characteristic_form: Time series vibration data in mm/s or g-force from gearbox accelerometers
note: Source: Condition monitoring; Owner: Predictive Maintenance Team; Recent vibration data for analysis

text: What was the total energy production of the wind farm yesterday?
characteristic_form: Total energy in MWh produced by all turbines in the farm for the previous day
note: Source: Daily operations report; Owner: Operations Team; Daily energy production summary

text: Forecast power output for Wind Turbine WT-105 for the next 48 hours.
characteristic_form: Predicted power output time series based on weather forecast and historical performance
note: Source: Energy trading requirements; Owner: Energy Management Team; Short-term power forecasting for grid planning

text: Predict the remaining useful life of the gearbox in Wind Turbine WT-105.
characteristic_form: Estimated remaining operational hours or days before gearbox replacement needed
note: Source: Predictive maintenance initiative; Owner: Reliability Engineering; RUL estimation for maintenance planning

text: Is there any anomaly detected in the vibration pattern of Wind Turbine WT-105?
characteristic_form: Boolean result with anomaly score and description of detected abnormal vibration patterns
note: Source: Condition monitoring system; Owner: Predictive Maintenance Team; Real-time anomaly detection query

text: Predict the probability of gearbox failure for Wind Turbine WT-105 in the next 30 days.
characteristic_form: Failure probability percentage with confidence interval based on condition indicators
note: Source: Risk assessment; Owner: Reliability Engineering; Failure probability estimation for risk management

text: Forecast wind speed at the wind farm location for the next 7 days.
characteristic_form: Hourly wind speed forecast in m/s based on meteorological models
note: Source: Weather service integration; Owner: Operations Team; Medium-term wind forecast for production planning

text: Detect any abnormal temperature rise in the generator of Wind Turbine WT-105.
characteristic_form: Alert if temperature exceeds normal operating range with severity level
note: Source: Thermal monitoring; Owner: Operations Team; Temperature anomaly detection for generator protection

text: Predict the next maintenance event for Wind Turbine WT-105.
characteristic_form: Predicted maintenance type and estimated date based on condition trends
note: Source: Maintenance optimization; Owner: Maintenance Team; Next maintenance event prediction

text: Forecast the monthly energy production for the wind farm for Q2 2024.
characteristic_form: Monthly energy production forecast in MWh for April, May, and June 2024
note: Source: Business planning; Owner: Management Team; Quarterly production forecast for revenue planning

text: Identify any degradation trend in the power curve of Wind Turbine WT-105.
characteristic_form: Trend analysis showing power curve degradation over time with degradation rate
note: Source: Performance monitoring; Owner: Analytics Team; Power curve degradation analysis for performance optimization

text: Predict ice formation risk on the blades of Wind Turbine WT-105 for tomorrow.
characteristic_form: Ice formation probability based on temperature, humidity, and precipitation forecast
note: Source: Weather-based risk assessment; Owner: Operations Team; Ice formation prediction for cold climate operations

text: Recommend maintenance actions for Wind Turbine WT-105 based on current condition.
characteristic_form: Prioritized list of recommended maintenance actions with justification and urgency level
note: Source: Condition-based maintenance; Owner: Maintenance Team; Maintenance recommendation based on condition indicators

text: Optimize the pitch angle for Wind Turbine WT-105 to maximize power output at current wind speed.
characteristic_form: Optimal pitch angle in degrees for current wind conditions to maximize power capture
note: Source: Performance optimization; Owner: Control Systems Team; Real-time pitch optimization for power maximization

text: Which wind turbines should be prioritized for maintenance this month?
characteristic_form: Ranked list of turbines with maintenance priority scores based on condition and risk
note: Source: Maintenance planning; Owner: Maintenance Manager; Monthly maintenance prioritization for resource allocation

text: Recommend the optimal time to schedule maintenance for Wind Turbine WT-105 to minimize production loss.
characteristic_form: Recommended maintenance window with expected wind conditions and production impact
note: Source: Maintenance scheduling optimization; Owner: Operations Team; Optimal maintenance timing to minimize downtime cost

text: Should Wind Turbine WT-105 be curtailed based on grid demand and current wind conditions?
characteristic_form: Curtailment recommendation with reasoning based on grid requirements and economic factors
note: Source: Grid integration; Owner: Energy Management Team; Curtailment decision support for grid stability

text: Recommend spare parts to stock based on failure predictions for the wind farm.
characteristic_form: List of recommended spare parts with quantities based on failure probability and lead time
note: Source: Inventory optimization; Owner: Supply Chain Team; Spare parts recommendation for inventory management

text: Optimize the yaw angle for Wind Turbine WT-105 to align with wind direction.
characteristic_form: Optimal yaw angle adjustment to maximize wind capture efficiency
note: Source: Control optimization; Owner: Control Systems Team; Yaw optimization for wind alignment

text: Recommend a maintenance strategy for the gearbox of Wind Turbine WT-105 based on its condition trend.
characteristic_form: Recommended maintenance strategy (preventive, predictive, or run-to-failure) with justification
note: Source: Maintenance strategy optimization; Owner: Reliability Engineering; Strategy recommendation based on condition monitoring

text: Which turbines should be shut down during the approaching storm to minimize damage risk?
characteristic_form: List of turbines recommended for shutdown with risk assessment and timing
note: Source: Weather risk management; Owner: Operations Team; Storm protection decision support

text: Recommend the optimal replacement schedule for aging wind turbine components across the farm.
characteristic_form: Multi-year component replacement schedule optimized for cost and reliability
note: Source: Asset lifecycle management; Owner: Asset Manager; Long-term replacement planning for fleet optimization
